newsSince: Q1 (reported May 8) was already in the prior case, but at/after COMPUTEX 2026 Himax disclosed fresh CPO and edge-AI traction: Gen1 CPO (1.6T/3.2T) now ready with small-quantity H2 2026 shipments and Gen2 (6.4T) nearing customer validation for AI data centers (with FOCI); a WiseEye smart-glasses design win with a 'leading brand' (MP later in 2026); and a T2000 ePaper timing-controller win in E Ink's 75-inch Kaleido platform. The -6.95% move is flow/de-crowding, not fundamental.

sources.label: Himax Q1 earnings call highlights (Globe & Mail)

verdicts.rankRationale: Through the co-packaged-optics lens, the prior 'low CPO exposure' dismissal is now somewhat stale: Gen1 CPO (1.6T/3.2T) is ready with H2 small-volume shipments and Gen2 (6.4T) is nearing AI-datacenter validation with FOCI. Modest up off rank 114; still indirect (silicon partner, not optics prime) so keep delta small.
verdicts.bull: Real CPO product roadmap (Gen1 shipping H2, Gen2 6.4T in validation) finally gives a direct datacenter-optics hook.
verdicts.neutral: CPO still small vs display core; partner role, revenue immaterial near-term.
verdicts.bear: Page thesis was 'low CPO exposure'; volumes unproven, display cycle dominates P&L.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Gen1 CPO small-quantity shipments H2 2026; Gen2 validation
verdicts.primaryRisk: CPO stays a minor partner line; display cyclicality

verdicts.rankRationale: On the test-time-scaling/edge-AI lens, fundamentals firmed modestly: Q2 guide +10-13% q/q, WiseEye smart-glasses design win with a leading brand for H2 MP, and the E Ink T2000 win broaden non-driver edge-AI revenue. Constructive but incremental; hold rank 22 with a token positive delta.
verdicts.bull: WiseEye edge-AI design wins (smart glasses) plus automotive ramp drive H2 momentum.
verdicts.neutral: Edge-AI is a real but small slice of a display-heavy business.
verdicts.bear: Most upside is later-2026; display cycle and ASP pressure remain the swing factor.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Smart-glasses WiseEye MP and H2 automotive ramp
verdicts.primaryRisk: Display downcycle; edge-AI revenue stays immaterial near-term
